# India Med Service

> Connecting international patients with world-class medical treatment in India.

India Med Service is a leading medical tourism platform that helps international patients find affordable, high-quality healthcare in India. We connect patients with top multispecialty hospitals, expert doctors, and provide complete visa & travel support.

## Key Pages

- [Home](https://indiamedservice.com/): Overview of services, hospitals, and specialities
- [Specialities](https://indiamedservice.com/speciality): Browse all medical specialities including Cardiac Care, Cancer Care, Neurosciences, Orthopaedics, and more

## Medical Specialities

- Cardiac Care — Heart surgery, angioplasty, bypass surgery
- Cancer Care — Oncology, chemotherapy, radiation therapy
- Neurosciences — Brain and spine surgery, neurological disorders
- Gastrosciences — Digestive system treatment, liver care
- Orthopaedics — Joint replacement, spine surgery, sports injuries
- Nephrology — Kidney transplant, dialysis services
- Pulmonology — Lung treatment, respiratory disorders
- Urology — Kidney stones, prostate treatment

## About India Med Service

- Trusted by patients from 70+ countries
- Access to 10+ top hospitals across India
- 10,000+ international patients served per year
- JCI & NABH accredited partner hospitals
- Complete support: medical visa, airport transfers, accommodation
- Treatment costs up to 70-80% lower than Western countries

## Contact & Support

For medical assistance and consultation, visit: https://indiamedservice.com
